---
title: Contact
format: html
css: styles.css
---

---
title: Contact
format: html
css: styles.css
---

::::: grid
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### {{< fa hospital-user >}} Neurology Clinic

**Dr. Hatice King** *Consultant Neurologist*

{{< fa phone >}} <a href="tel:0214865730">021 4865730</a>

{{< fa envelope >}} <a href="mailto:hatice.kurucuking@healthmail.ie">hatice.kurucuking@healthmail.ie</a>

{{< fa location-dot >}} <a href="https://www.google.com/maps?q=51.894111,-8.497762" target="_blank">Cork Clinic, Block B Suite 16,<br>Western Road, Cork, T12 PY26</a>





**Referrals:** Accepted via Healthlink.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### {{< fa user-tie >}} Neuroscience Consultancy

**Dr. Declan King** *Director of Research & Operations*

{{< fa phone >}} <a href="tel:+353851719782">+353 85 171 9782</a>

{{< fa envelope >}} <a href="mailto:info@kingsneuroconsultants.com">info@kingsneuroconsultants.com</a>

**Consultancy:** For pharmaceutical partnerships or research design, please email to arrange a preliminary discovery call.
:::
:::::
